name: 1'8"x2'6" Low Profile Kitchen Mat Gray - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring function and style to your indoor space with the Low-Profile Kitchen Mat from Room Essentials™. This rectangular kitchen mat comes in a gray hue for a stylish look that blends well with any decor. The polyurethane material provides soft underfoot comfort, while a flat pile height makes it suitable for high-traffic areas within your home.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
